title: Render command palette as an overlay over the app frame (not blank backdrop)
description: The Ctrl-K palette currently does frame = lipgloss.Place(a.width, a.height, Center, Top, box) in internal/tui/app.go View, which REPLACES the whole composed frame (sidebar|main|detail) with the box on a blank field — so the app vanishes behind the palette and it looks unanchored. Fix: composite the palette box OVER the existing frame (keep horizontal center + top alignment), so the app stays visible (optionally dimmed) behind a modal box. Add an ANSI-aware overlay helper. Keep the frame exactly a.width x a.height.
closed_reason: Completed: palette now composites over the dimmed app frame via ANSI-aware overlay() helper; centered, dimensions preserved; backdrop visible
